description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Semgrep that can be triggered manually, on pull requests, and on push events to the master and dev branches when the .github/workflows/semgrep.yml file changes. Run a job named semgrep/ci in an ubuntu-20.04 environment, using a Semgrep container, and execute the semgrep ci command with a Semgrep app token from secrets, excluding runs triggered by dependabot.
